name: Feynman Technique
what_it_is: Testing depth of understanding by explaining a concept in plain language as if teaching someone with no background.
core_mechanic: Write the concept. Explain in plain language. Identify where explanation breaks down - those are the gaps. Return to source material for exactly those gaps. Re-explain. Repeat until simple and complete.
when_to_use: Consumed a lot of material but unsure you understand it / Can explain using field vocabulary but not plain language / Want to identify precise boundaries of what you know
when_not_to_use: Early exposure to a new domain - need input before you can explain / When the goal is breadth not depth
ideaos_application: Agent 3 identifies where the input explanation becomes jargon-dependent or hand-wavy. Produces a 3-step learning prescription: what to understand first, what depends on it, what becomes possible once both are understood.
